creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm reopening this bug.

Using -F causes problem when the file downloaded first is corrupt or the wrong one.

You can try on biology/gmap for instance:
- The master site redirects to an error page which is downloaded
- The distcache has the good file but only the end of it is fetched
- The final file is a mix of the 2

Other ports affected: astro/wmmoonclock ,  security/pear-Auth_OpenID , games/wmfortune , x11/wmblob
